title: Clinical course of Covid-19 in a cohort of patients with Behcet disease.
author: Correa-Rodriguez M Callejas-Rubio JL Rueda-Medina B Rios-Fernandez R Hera-Fernandez J Ortego-Centeno N
content:
S-EPMC8712259 PMC8712259 Clinical course of Covid-19 in a cohort of patients with Behcet disease.

Objective

The implications of Covid-19 in patients with Behçet's disease (BD) are unknown. Patients with BD usually take long-term therapy with therapeutic agents that have been tested
